meaning: n.苏台德区(在捷克斯洛伐克西北部)
examples: "What if the Allies would have said to Hitler enough is enough when he annexed the Sudetenland, " he asked.
Three times premier and minister of war, he signed the Munich pact with British prime minister Chamberlain which gave Hitler posession of the Sudetenland.
He arrived on September 29, 1938, just as the Munich Pact handed over to Hitler the part of Czechoslovakia the Germans called the Sudetenland.
